{"step_by_step_thinking": "The query specifically asks about a parameter used to determine the sensitivity of vaccine due to heat. Among the options provided, VVM stands for Visual Vaccine Monitor, which is a label placed on vaccine vials to indicate if they have been exposed to excessive heat or freezing temperatures. This aligns with the requirement to assess vaccine sensitivity to heat. VMV, VCM, and VMM do not have a clear definition in the context of vaccine heat sensitivity.", "answer_choice": "A"}
